A.evidence: Faithful prose, complete through p5. But quotes flattened to apostrophes throughout, OCR error in email ('1owe@openai . com' for lowe@openai.com), and structure is flat: no markdown headings, no bold on finding paragraphs, authors one-per-line. No tables in covered pages (neutral).

B.evidence: Clean, faithful text with proper curly quotes and footnote markers ($^3$). Bold finding headings, grouped author rows, LaTeX math ($85 \pm 3\%$). Section headers present. No JSON/loops/artifacts. No tables visible (neutral).

C.evidence: Good text with italics/bold headings, but a large block (p5 remainder + related-work intro) is dumped as a raw JSON array of {bbox,category,text} objects mid-document — a glaring reading-order/structure artifact. Math plain (85 ± 3%). Text within JSON is accurate but rendered broken.

D.evidence: ## headings present and image placeholders, but author block fragmented one-per-line, quotes flattened to apostrophes, merge error 'Agoal', stray spaces ('InstructGPT .'). Finding headings not bolded. Complete prose. Math plain.

E.evidence: Strongest: clean text, curly quotes, italics, footnote markers ([^1]), author superscripts, bold finding headings, and Figure 2 reconstructed as an HTML table preserving step labels. Proper LaTeX math ($85 \pm 3\%$, $73.4 \pm 2\%$). No artifacts.

F.evidence: ## headings and author list as a markdown table, but OCR corruptions: 'Tamarin et al.' for Tamkin, and '100 fewer parameters' drops the 'x' (100x). Straight quotes, finding headings not bolded. Math plain. Otherwise complete.

G.evidence: Broken: <|LOC_..|> coordinate tokens appended to most lines; catastrophic degenerate loop ('175B 175B...' repeated hundreds of times); Figure 2 hallucinated into a looping 'Step 1..20' list; duplicated paragraph; OCR errors ('an average' for avenue, 'love@openai'). Severely damaged.

H.evidence: Faithful prose with proper quotes and italics and # headings, but heavily cluttered with inline citation links (#page-XX anchors) and <span id> HTML anchors; malformed footnote markup ('<sup>&</sup>lt;sup>3</sup>'). Finding headings not bolded. Math plain (85 ± 3%).
